title: Missing rollback plan — field type overwrite with no recovery path
expected_feedback: Critical: In-place field type conversion from string to double overwrites the original string values permanently. MongoDB has no transactional DDL — once updateMany completes, the original string amounts are gone. No rollback path is documented. This is an irreversible operation. Fix: use new-field pattern (amount_v2 as double), keep original field, dual-read in application, then cleanup in separate release. Or take a collection snapshot before proceeding.
violated_rule: Rollback path documented for every phase
